for_c_level: This run exposes high operational risk in the testing infrastructure, halting progress toward production readiness. No advancements or regressions vs. prior runs as zero data was produced, undermining any customer-facing claims on reliability. Prioritize harness fixes to resume validation cadence.
for_non_technical: This test didn't run any checks because the system couldn't collect the results. That means we have no information on whether agents can reliably share memories with each other. We need to fix the testing setup to get useful data next time.
for_sme: Complete failure mode where no scenario reports were recovered, impacting all requested scenarios (S1, S1b, S2, S4-S6, S9-S18, S22-S25, S28-S42) across primitives like federation mesh under mTLS. Probable root cause is CI harness issue in report aggregation (harness_sha: 1bd0ee3aa288f24b2de73f13157d9ee6a0b59114), possibly due to infra provisioning or droplet connectivity in 4-node topology. No specific primitives tested; investigate workflow_url for logs.
headline: Campaign failed: No scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Implement robust report recovery and error handling in the CI harness to ensure scenario results are captured.
verdict: FAIL — no scenarios executed or reported.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a complete failure in the testing harness to recover any scenario results, providing no evidence on agent memory sharing reliability.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised, despite requesting 35 scenarios covering various transport, framework, and primitive axes, due to report recovery failure.
